demo.title: hn-digest.sh
demo.code:
# Default 24h window, all interest tags
aeon-hacker-news-digest

# AI + crypto only, score >= 200
aeon-hacker-news-digest interests="ai,crypto" min_score=200

# Threads with at least 100 comments
aeon-hacker-news-digest min_comments=100

setup: No API key required (uses public Algolia + Firebase endpoints)
